composio_raw.name: QuickBooks
composio_raw.description: Quickbooks is a cloud-based accounting software that helps you manage your finances, track your income and expenses, and get insights into your business

llm_raw.description: A cloud-based accounting software suite for small and medium-sized businesses to manage income, expenses, and financial reporting.
llm_raw.notes: Relied on industry knowledge of the Intuit Developer platform and existing Composio toolkit integration capabilities.
